css: .design-hero { padding: 100px 20px; text-align: center; color: #fff; } .glitch-text { font-size: 4.5rem; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 5px; text-shadow: 2px 2px #4facfe, -2px -2px #f093fb; margin-bottom: 20px; } .portfolio-preview { display: flex; gap: 20px; justify-content: center; margin: 50px 0; } .p-card { width: 300px; height: 180px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 15px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-weight: 700; color: #4facfe; } .contact-box { background: rgba(79, 172, 254, 0.1); border: 1px solid #4facfe; padding: 40px; border-radius: 20px; display: inline-block; }
